biological_replicate: tomato prf3, prf3/Prf-SBP-FLAG, 76 S and 76 R lines
technical_replicate: three technical replicates were used for each.
experimental_design: comparative transcriptomics between prf3/Prf-SBP-FLAG and tft3 #2-2 line treated with either buffer (as control) or Pst DC3000
factor_value: prf3/Prf-SBP-FLAG and tft3 #2-2 line treated with either buffer or Pst DC3000
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
